channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Soludo’s wife celebrates discharge of brutalised 10-year-old boy from Anambra hospital
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Anambra First Lady, Nonye Soludo, celebrates the full recovery and discharge of a 10-year-old boy brutalised by guardians, pledging continued support.
Read More: https://punchng.com/soludos-wife-celebrates-discharge-of-brutalised-10-year-old-boy-from-anambra-hospital/

item.title: Northants beat Hampshire in thriller to win first Blast title in a decade
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: ​​​​​​​Northamptonshire claimed their first Vitality Blast title in a decade and third overall with a thrilling 14-run win over Hampshire in Saturday's see-saw Edgbaston final.

item.title: Management debunks death rumours of TikToker following violent assault

item.title: Soludo unveils Achebe’s monument, urges youth to imbibe legacy
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Governor Soludo unveils a monument to Chinua Achebe, urging Anambra youth to reject cultism and embrace the literary icon’s intellectual and moral legacy.

item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The Nigerian Army, weekend, said that it's troops of 65 Battalion have successfully dismantled a suspected illegal bunkering site in the Orile area of Lagos State, leading to the arrest of six suspects and the recovery of items linked to the illicit activity. item.title: Transfer: Eintracht Frankfurt agree personal terms with Onyedika
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Raphael Onyedika is nearing a permanent transfer to Bundesliga club Eintracht Frankfurt after agreeing personal terms, DAILY POST reports. Eintracht Frankfurt are, however, still in talks with Belgian Pro League champions Club Brugge to finalise the deal. The Eagles have made attempts to sign Onyedi

item.title: Iran Threatens ‘Unforgettable Lessons’, As Two US Troops Killed
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: A month after the foes signed a now-abandoned preliminary deal aimed at ending their war, Tehran struck infrastructure around the Gulf in retaliation for a week of intensifying US attacks, which Iran said had hit an airport, a railway station, and bridges. The post Iran Threatens ‘Unforgettabl

item.title: NPFL: Kabiru Dogo begins work at Niger Tornadoes
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Kabiru Dogo has resumed duties as technical adviser of Niger Tornadoes, DAILY POST reports. Dogo was appointed to his new role earlier this month. He had his first training session with the team on Saturday. The experienced tactician guided El-Kanemi Warriors to the 2026 President Federation Cup tri

item.title: Oyo APC crisis deepens as six governorship aspirants reject Sharafadeen Alli’s candidacy
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: A fresh crisis has emerged within the Oyo State chapter of the All Progressives Congress (APC) after six of the party's 11 governorship aspirants rejected the emergence of Senator Sharafadeen Alli as the party's gubernatorial candidate for the 2027 general election. item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Martin O'Neill insists Celtic are "making some progress" in introducing more new faces to his squad as he opens up on the failure to re-sign Kelechi Iheanacho and Marcelo Saracchi.

item.title: “I Escaped Rape By Armed Robbers Because I Was Menstruating” — Married Woman Recounts Ordeal In Oyo
item.dc:creator: Information Nigeria
item.description: A 28-year-old woman has narrated how her menstrual period allegedly saved her from being raped after she and other were attacked by suspected armed robbers along the Aawe–Iwo Road in Afijio Local Government Area of Oyo State. Speaking to Saturday Tribune, the woman said she, her husband and a 20-yea

item.title: All to know about Canadian wildfire smoke, air quality and World Cup final
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: A thunderstorm rolled through the region causing disruption, and a haze raised air quality concerns in New York City.

item.title: Foreign Affairs Minister Meets Portuguese Counterpart
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Nigeria’s Minister of Foreign Affairs, Bianca Odumegwu-Ojukwu, has reaffirmed the country’s commitment to strengthening bilateral relations with Portugal, with both countries exploring deeper cooperation in trade, investment, renewable energy, maritime security and other strategic sector

item.title: Hungary's president agrees to stand down after parliament backs removal
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: Tamás Sulyok, seen as an Orbán loyalist, had until Saturday night to agree to end his term.

item.title: Radda Commissions Ultra-Modern Remawa Health Clinic
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: He also announced that 1,000 vulnerable residents from the Remawa, Yargwamna, ’Yartsamiya and ’Yarnabanye communities would be enrolled in the Katsina State Contributory Healthcare Management Agency (KTSCHMA). item.title: Oyo: Police arrest suspected armed robber following attack on okada rider
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Oyo State Police Command has arrested a suspected armed robber and recovered a stolen motorcycle following an alleged attack on a commercial motorcyclist in the Apata area of Ibadan. According to a statement by the Police Public Relations Officer, DSP Ayanlade Olayinka, the command received cred

item.title: Sen Kalu Condoles With Amaechi over Mother’s Death
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: The Senator representing Abia North Senatorial District, Senator Orji Uzor Kalu, has expressed sadness over the death of Dame Ezinne Mary Oduah Amaechi, mother of former Governor of Rivers State

item.title: Shakira unleashes global dancers for explosive World Cup 2026 Final performance
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The high-energy track, blending Latin rhythms, Afrobeats grooves, and infectious stadium chants, has topped Spotify’s global chart for multiple weeks, amassed hundreds of millions of streams, and even charted on the Billboard Hot 100.

item.title: Thousands rally in London in support of Gaza, demand new PM take action
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Demonstrators call on Andy Burnham to impose arms embargo on Israel and pressure its government to end genocide.

item.title: Waymo says San Francisco service has resumed after one-hour pause
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: This isn’t the first time power outages have caused issues for Waymo.

item.title: World Cup: ‘Nonsense, rubbish, meaningless match’ – Alan Shearer hit out at FIFA over third-place game
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: England football icon, Alan Shearer, has slammed FIFA for their decision to organize a third-place playoff in the 2026 World Cup, which is scheduled to feature France and England on Saturday. The third-place playoff, now referred to as the bronze match, will be played merely three days following the

item.title: FG Launches Nigeria Genomic City Project, Eyes $300bn Economic Boost
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The Federal Government has unveiled the Nigeria Genomic City Project, an initiative aimed at positioning the country as Africa’s leading hub for genomics, biotechnology and scientific innovation. Presidential spokesperson, Dada Olusegun, disclosed the development in a statement shared v
